Michael Johnson
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Dedicated and experienced Forklift Operator with over 5 years of hands-on experience in warehouse environments. Proficient in operating Class I, IV, and V forklifts, including reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts. Adept at utilizing Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) to enhance operational efficiency and accuracy. Committed to maintaining safety standards and ensuring a productive work environment.

Experience

Forklift Operator  
ABC Logistics, Atlanta, GA  
April 2020 - Present  
- Operate reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts to move goods within the warehouse and to loading docks.  
- Utilize WMS to track inventory and manage shipping/receiving processes, improving efficiency by 20%.  
- Conduct regular safety checks on equipment and maintain compliance with OSHA standards.  

Forklift Operator  
XYZ Distribution Center, Atlanta, GA  
June 2018 - March 2020  
- Handled various forklift operations, including loading and unloading pallets in a fast-paced environment.  
- Collaborated with team members to optimize warehouse layout for efficient product flow.  
- Trained new employees on safe forklift operations and best practices in warehouse management.  

Warehouse Associate  
Global Supply Co., Atlanta, GA  
January 2016 - May 2018  
- Assisted in daily warehouse operations, including inventory management and product organization.  
- Gained foundational experience in operating forklifts and understanding warehouse procedures.  

Certifications  
- OSHA Forklift Operator Certification (Class I, IV, V)  
- Certified in Warehouse Management Systems (WMS)  

Skills  
- Proficient in operating reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts  
- Strong understanding of OSHA safety regulations  
- Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail  
- Effective communication and teamwork abilities  

Education  
High School Diploma  
Atlanta High School, Atlanta, GA
